summary: Base W12 — the §10 test week (~14 mpw + race). Fri's 5K TT locks the goal tier (≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory) and formally recalibrates T pace after five straight T sessions quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge. Tue's Hyp A delivered the lift-side headline: the §5 AMRAP/TM re-test came back 145×5 RIR 2 + 130×13 AMRAP → e1RM 186, new TM 168 (was 162) — the best test mark of the cycle; incline bumps 145→150 next Tue when W13's Build structure (1×5 top + AMRAP @ 80%) takes over (Adj #145). Rear-delt 135 landed at the prescribed RIR 3 (Adj #149), pushdown 25 fired with the elbow fine throughout — §10.A clock intact at 2 clean sessions (Adj #150) — and preacher's Tue 65 ran its first clean outing, bump-eligible 70 (Adj #147). Standing order unchanged: honest Z1 only before the TT (Adj #142); Tue's fed/AM reads went unrecorded, so report the Wed AM Achilles/knee read before the pre-TT strides (Adj #151). Sat Hyp B slate: lat pulldown 165 (Adj #133), DB lateral 35 (Adj #137), Sat decline crunch add-load (Adj #138); seated calf holds 345 (zero headroom, Adj #135); preacher Sat holds 60 (Adj #139).

days.note: Logged — ran as off-protocol progression: ~3.4 mi / 30:00 @ 8:46 avg (9:16/8:58/8:09/8:23), HR 167 avg / 185 peak, felt chill. No pain anywhere — Adj #135 Achilles recheck satisfied (Adj #142/#143). W11 Wed confirmed skipped (Adj #144).

Logged — §5 re-test: 145×5 RIR 2 + 130×13 AMRAP → e1RM 186, new TM 168; incline 150 next Tue (Adj #145). Rear-delt 135 landed RIR 3 (Adj #149); pushdown 25 fired, elbow fine, front-half landing 12/12/9/8 (Adj #150); preacher 65 first clean outing → 70 eligible (Adj #147); crunch 10 lb 12/8/8 — hold + rebuild (Adj #148); DB lat 30 hold (Adj #146). Fed/AM reads not recorded (Adj #151).

§4.C W12 pre-TT sharpener — flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 (Adj #25/#62). Easy portion HONEST 9:45–10:45/mi — Mon already spent the week's unprescribed intensity budget (Adj #142). Report the AM Achilles/knee read pre-strides (Adj #151).
Permanent off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk + daily SI prehab. Rest before the TT.

Goal tier locks here: ≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory; 21:31–22:30 = downgrade to 20:59; >22:30 = downgrade to 21:30. Flat course or treadmill 1%, racing intent. Also formally recalibrates T pace (Adj #77/#93/#125). Full warmup; do not renegotiate the tier later. Mon's 8:09-at-chill mile is a good omen for ≤21:30.

days.session: Z1 easy 30 min (day-after) + Hyp B PM
days.note: Bumps: lat pulldown 160→165 on a clean set 3 (Adj #133); DB lateral 30→35 (Adj #137); decline crunch add small load at 3×10 (Adj #138). Holds: seated calf 345 zero-headroom (Adj #135); preacher Sat 60 — 65 needs a full clean outing (Adj #139); pushdown 25 if not attempted Tue, pain-gated (Adj #136); chest fly 130 (Adj #140). Run is a 30-min shakeout, truly easy.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1 pyramid, daily SI prehab.
